overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night at the North Oak Columbarium. The player approaches the modern memorial entrance, observes two NPCs interacting near a digital wall, and enters a dark corridor with dramatic teal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy plaza approaching modern memorial entrance

events.description: camera begins ascending the shallow steps toward the main entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet pavement toward the illuminated stairs of the columbarium

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the memorial building entrance with warm uplighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
futuristic building facade with geometric concrete forms and embedded lighting
futuristic cars parked along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked plaza at night, with the camera approaching a modern memorial entrance. Wet pavement reflects the teal sky and warm ground lights as the player walks toward wide stone stairs flanked by palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: columbarium memorial wall with digital displays

events.description: camera turns left away from the main stairs toward the columbarium wall
camera slows and approaches two NPCs sitting near a bench

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the columbarium wall and approaching two individuals sitting near a warm light source

notable_agents.action: seated on a bench, leaning forward in conversation with another person
kneeling on the ground, gesturing while talking to the seated individual

entered.detail: large recessed wall with glowing blue digital interface displaying COLUMBARIUM text
simple metal bench with warm ground lighting
glowing orange heat lamp on a stand illuminating the corner

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the main entrance, the camera moves under the building overhang toward a digital memorial wall. Two NPCs are discovered in a sheltered corner—one seated on a bench, one kneeling—engaged in an animated conversation beside a glowing heat lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: sheltered corner of columbarium with NPC interaction

events.description: camera circles around the two NPCs, observing from different angles
camera begins to back away from the NPCs toward the open plaza

agents.ego_description: circling around the two NPCs to observe their interaction from multiple angles before departing

notable_agents.action: seated man with cybernetic arm engaged in intense conversation
kneeling woman gesturing with her hands while speaking

entered.detail: wall with white graffiti tags illuminated by the warm lamp
main entrance staircase visible again as camera returns

segments.scene_description: The camera circles closely around the two NPCs, capturing their intimate conversation from various perspectives in the warmly lit corner. After observing, the camera retreats back toward the plaza, passing graffiti-covered walls and returning to the entrance stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark memorial corridor with teal accent lighting

events.description: camera enters the dark enclosed corridor of the columbarium
corridor opens into outdoor columned memorial walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark corridor with teal lighting and emerging into a columned outdoor passage

entered.detail: long narrow passage with dark polished walls and recessed teal lighting
linear LED strips emitting cyan light along the base of walls
tall dark stone monoliths lining the path

segments.scene_description: Entering the columbarium proper, the camera moves through a dark, narrow corridor illuminated by teal accent lights. The space transitions into an open-air walkway flanked by tall memorial columns, with rain still falling in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked outdoor plaza into the moody, illuminated depths of a modern columbarium. It begins by approaching a wide stone entrance flanked by palm trees, where wet pavement reflects the teal sky and warm ground lighting. As the camera moves under a building overhang, the scene shifts toward a sheltered corner where two NPCs engage in an animated conversation beside a glowing heat lamp. After circling the pair to capture their intimate interaction, the camera retreats past graffiti-covered walls and returns to the stairs before finally entering the facility. The movement concludes as the camera glides through a dark, narrow corridor defined by teal accent lights that opens into a walkway of tall memorial columns under the falling rain.
